name: DeployGuard
description: Pre-deployment policy checker that validates secret expiry, open P1 bugs, code coverage, and branch policies before allowing deployment.
author: DeployGuard

inputs.name: environment
inputs.label: Environment
inputs.helpMarkDown: The deployment environment name (e.g., production, staging)

inputs.name: keyVaultName
inputs.label: Azure Key Vault Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Name of the Azure Key Vault to check for expiring secrets

inputs.name: areaPath
inputs.label: Area Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure DevOps area path to check for P1 bugs (e.g., MyProject\Backend)

inputs.name: secretExpiryWarningDays
inputs.label: Secret Expiry Warning Days
inputs.helpMarkDown: Number of days before secret expiry to trigger a warning

inputs.name: targetBranch
inputs.label: Target Branch
inputs.helpMarkDown: Branch to check for branch policies
